package.name: fyp_jackal_navigation
package.description: Navigation for the FYP Jackal: AMCL localization on the Hokuyo 2D lidar, move_base with the Livox Mid-360 point cloud fused into the costmaps via a height-filtered voxel layer. Overhead structure above the robot's clearance height (e.g. a bridge deck) is ignored so the robot can drive underneath, while lower 3D obstacles (tripod box, bridge supports) are marked and avoided.
